69268.title: Joy Ride
69268.description: Two men meet in an endless frozen tundra and try to find their way out of it.

69269.title: Welcome To Iron Knob
69269.description: After a boy accidentally shoots a stranger with his father's gun, the nonchalant townspeople help cover up the crime.

69270.title: Cabu Cabu 011
69270.description: Mamadou is a young African man living in Turin and working illegally as a cabu-cabu, a kind of taxi driver used by the Black community.

69271.title: Love For Hire
69271.description: A sociopathic millennial seeks the help of Greek God Cupid to seduce her crush, but things do not go as expected.

69272.title: Our Next Caller
69272.description: A failing legal advice radio program gets a sudden boost in popularity when a mysterious caller offers a violent proposal.

69273.title: Leila's Blues
69273.description: A mother of a child who was born with special needs is shocked to find out she is pregnant again. She decides to have an abortion without telling her husband.

69274.title: Cycling Shoes
69274.description: Harold receives a new pair of cycling shoes for his birthday, but his bike is still damaged and he's saving all his money for a school trip with his crush.

69275.title: Anna
69275.description: A young woman on the autism spectrum, Anna enjoys a life rigorously dictated by routine. When an individual unwittingly takes her seat on the morning bus, her day spins rapidly out of control.

69276.title: Adam's Day
69276.description: Adam is a young boy from a difficult home environment who escapes to the fields to create a beautiful and fun world for himself.

69278.title: The Leak
69278.description: Maria has always played the part of the caring mother and grandmother, which is what everyone expected from her. But then a simple question leads her to realise that she needs an authentic friendship.

69279.title: Out Of Scene
69279.description: As if by magic, Hopper's painting Automat comes to life and the viewer is transported to 1926 inside the painting, and its protagonist comes to life with all its history.

69280.title: The Silent Child
69280.description: Busy parents Sue and Paul decide to get help from social worker, Joanne, to prepare their youngest daughter Libby, who is deaf, for the big step of going to school for the first time. Joanne and Libby bond almost immediately, with Joanne beginning to teach a responsive Libby British Sign Language.

69282.title: Until The Last Train
69282.description: Two women and a social mandate; a train station that brings them back together. This time, they must face their desires and make a decision.

69283.title: Marusía
69283.description: Two ordinary guys with nothing to lose because they might have already lost everything, they decide to run away heading nowhere. But sometimes running away is not the solution.

69284.title: The Firefly Girls
69284.description: A father loses his daughter and now spends his time hiding in his house and drinking himself into a stupor. Meanwhile, a young girl from the neighbourhood is determined to sell the last of her Firefly Girl cookies.

69285.title: Scrap
69285.description: Geert Van Steenkiste, The Photo Radar Marathon Man, loves his old car, a Nissan Micra, so much that he can't let go of it. When a repo man comes to collect his car, he takes things a little further.

69286.title: Mr H.
69286.description: A delirious audience, the wonder in the spectators eyes, a man's manifience, a whole world expectations enclosed in two hours. Ladies and gentlement: Mr. H, alias Henry Houdini.

69287.title: The Wait
69287.description: When a single mother learns about a terrorist attack in London, she desperately tries to contact her son, who lives and studies in the British Capital.

69288.title: The Midnight Hour - Concealed Longings
69288.description: Shorts that satisfy all horror film needs.
